quick_skim.title: AI-Generated Image Recognition via Fusion of CNNs and Vision Transformers
quick_skim.abstract: Recent advancements in synthetic data technology have opened a new era where images of remarkable quality are generated, blurring the lines between real-life images and those produced by Artificial Intelligence (AI). This evolution poses a significant challenge to ensuring the reliability and authenticity of data, underscoring the need for robust detection methods. In this paper, we present a robust approach aimed at addressing these pressing concerns. Our methodology revolves around leveraging fusion strategies, combining the strengths of multiple detection methods for identifying AI-generated images. Through extensive experimentation on the CIFAKE dataset, our model showcases remarkable performance, achieving an impressive accuracy rate of 97.32%. This accomplishment underscores the efficacy of our approach in accurately distinguishing between AI-generated images and real-life images, thus contributing to the advancement of data authentication techniques amidst the proliferation of synthetic data.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: fuses features from CNNs and Vision Transformers for image recognition
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 融合CNN和Vision Transformer的特征用于图像识别

quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 融合CNN和Vision Transformer的特征用于图像识别
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes fusion of CNNs and Vision Transformers for AI-generated image recognition, achieving 97.32% accuracy on CIFAKE.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对AI生成图像识别问题，提出融合卷积神经网络和视觉变换器特征的检测方法。通过多方法融合策略，在CIFAKE数据集上达到97.32%的准确率，验证了特征级融合在图像识别中的有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对AI生成图像识别问题，提出融合卷积神经网络和视觉变换器特征的检测方法。通过多方法融合策略，在CIFAKE数据集上达到97.32%的准确率，验证了特征级融合在图像识别中的有效性。
